zh.Easby, Richmondshire, Yorkshire, England: 英國英格蘭越可爾易亞斯比
zh.Ravensworth, Riding, Yorkshire, England: 英國英格蘭越可爾拉文斯沃斯
zh.lifeSummary: 當Garsiena FitzEnisan de Pleven於1100年出生在英國越可爾易亞斯比時，她的父親Enisan Musard I, de Plevan, Constable of Richmond Castle41歲，母親Hildegarde de Penthièvre41歲。她與Sir Roald "Le Ennase" Fitz Harscoit 2nd Constable of Richmond Castle在英國英格蘭結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1150年在她的家鄉享年50歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭越可爾易亞斯比。

zh-hans.Easby, Richmondshire, Yorkshire, England: 英国英格兰越可爾易亞斯比
zh-hans.Ravensworth, Riding, Yorkshire, England: 英国英格兰越可爾拉文斯沃斯
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Garsiena FitzEnisan de Pleven于1100年出生在英国越可爾易亞斯比时，她的父亲Enisan Musard I, de Plevan, Constable of Richmond Castle41岁，母亲Hildegarde de Penthièvre41岁。她与Sir Roald "Le Ennase" Fitz Harscoit 2nd Constable of Richmond Castle在英国英格兰结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1150年在她的家乡享年50岁，埋葬在英国英格兰越可爾易亞斯比。

historicEvents.title: The Battle of Tichebray
historicEvents.description: King Henry I defeated and captured his brother, Robert of Normandy, at the Battle of Tinchebray in 1106. Robert remained in captivity until his death in 1134.

en.lifeSummary: When Garsiena FitzEnisan de Pleven was born in 1100, in Easby, Yorkshire, England, her father, Enisan Musard I, de Plevan, Constable of Richmond Castle, was 41 and her mother, Hildegarde de Penthièvre, was 41. She married Sir Roald "Le Ennase" Fitz Harscoit 2nd Constable of Richmond Castle in England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 2 daughters. She died in 1150, in her hometown, at the age of 50, and was buried in Easby, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Garsiena FitzEnisan de Pleven est née en 1100, à Easby, Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, Enisan Musard I, de Plevan, Constable of Richmond Castle, avait 41 ans et sa mère, Hildegarde de Penthièvre, avait 41 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Roald "Le Ennase" Fitz Harscoit 2nd Constable of Richmond Castle à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en 1150, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 50 ans, et a été enterrée à Easby, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Garsiena FitzEnisan de Pleven 1100 in Easby, Yorkshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Enisan Musard I, de Plevan, Constable of Richmond Castle 41 und ihre Mutter Hildegarde de Penthièvre 41. Sie hat in England, United Kingdom Sir Roald "Le Ennase" Fitz Harscoit 2nd Constable of Richmond Castle geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1150 im Alter von 50 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort und wurde in Easby, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Garsiena FitzEnisan de Pleven è nata il nel 1100 nel Easby, Yorkshire, England, sua padre, Enisan Musard I, de Plevan, Constable of Richmond Castle, aveva 41 anni e sua madre, Hildegarde de Penthièvre, aveva 41 anni. Lei sposato Sir Roald "Le Ennase" Fitz Harscoit 2nd Constable of Richmond Castle nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1150, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 50 anni, e fu sepolta a Easby, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.Easby, Yorkshire, England: イギリスヨークシュアイアエアスビー

ja.Richmond, Yorkshire, England: イギリスヨークシュアイアリチモンド
ja.lifeSummary: Garsiena FitzEnisan de Plevenが1100年にイギリスヨークシュアイアエアスビーで生まれた時，父Enisan Musard I, de Plevan, Constable of Richmond Castleは41歳，母Hildegarde de Penthièvreは41歳であった。イギリスイギリスでSir Roald "Le Ennase" Fitz Harscoit 2nd Constable of Richmond Castleと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1150年に故郷で50歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアエアスビーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Garsiena FitzEnisan de Pleven(이)가 1100년 영국 요르크실르 이스비에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Enisan Musard I, de Plevan, Constable of Richmond Castle(은)는 41세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Hildegarde de Penthièvre(은)는 41세였다. 그녀는 영국 잉글랜드에서 Sir Roald "Le Ennase" Fitz Harscoit 2nd Constable of Richmond Castle(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1150년 그녀의 고향에서 50세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 이스비에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Garsiena FitzEnisan de Pleven nasceu em 1100, em Easby, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Enisan Musard I, de Plevan, Constable of Richmond Castle, tinha 41 anos e sua mãe, Hildegarde de Penthièvre, tinha 41 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Roald "Le Ennase" Fitz Harscoit 2nd Constable of Richmond Castle em Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1150, em sua cidade natal, com 50 anos, e foi sepultada em Easby, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Garsiena FitzEnisan de Pleven родилась в 1100 г. в местности эасби, еркшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Enisan Musard I, de Plevan, Constable of Richmond Castle было 41 год, а матери, которую звали Hildegarde de Penthièvre, 41. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Roald "Le Ennase" Fitz Harscoit 2nd Constable of Richmond Castle в местности Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1150 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 50 лет и была похоронена в местности эасби, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Garsiena FitzEnisan de Pleven nació en 1100, en Easby, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Enisan Musard I, de Plevan, Constable of Richmond Castle, tenía 41 años y su mamá, Hildegarde de Penthièvre, tenía 41 años. Se casó con Sir Roald "Le Ennase" Fitz Harscoit 2nd Constable of Richmond Castle en Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en 1150, en su pueblo, a la edad de 50 años, y fue sepultada en Easby, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
